lead.headline: A critical hire awaits your decision this afternoon.
lead.deck: Your first interview for the Lived Experience Lead role with Matt Ross happens at 1:30 p.m.—a position that will shape how your organization connects with the communities you serve. Getting this right sets the tone for everything that follows.
